cast.name: Grace Bustos
cast.character: Underwater Swimming Girl at Pool Party

cast.name: Tyrone D. Dixon
cast.character: Actor in 'Angels Live in My Town'

plot outline: Adult film director Jack Horner is always on the lookout for new talent and it's only by chance that he meets Eddie Adams who is working as a busboy in a restaurant. Eddie is young, good looking and plenty of libido to spare. Using the screen name Dirk Diggler, he quickly rises to the top of his industry winning awards year after year. Drugs and ego however come between Dirk and those around him and he soon finds that fame is fleeting.
title: Boogie Nights
akas: ブギーナイツ (Japan, Japanese title)
